meta.description: HybridRAG evaluation set for the PRPC industrial data twin. Grounded in real, computed relationships -- expected answers were derived programmatically from world_model.json, not hand-guessed.
meta.usage: Run each question through VectorRAG-only, GraphRAG-only, and HybridRAG pipelines. Score against expected_answer / expected_entities. naive_keyword_hit_count shows how many raw documents a traditional keyword search would return for the primary entity -- use it to quantify time-to-answer / review burden versus a direct RAG answer.

questions.question: Identify any High or Critical severity incidents that were flagged as regulatory-reportable but have no corresponding regulatory submission on file.

questions.question: Which High-criticality equipment items have BOTH an open/unresolved defect finding AND an overdue inspection as of 2026-07-17? These represent compound operational risk.
questions.expected_answer: 100-V-109 (Flash Drum): Minor defect per IR-100-V-109-2024-016, inspection overdue by 500d; 200-F-206 (Reactor Feed Heater): Minor defect per IR-200-F-206-2024-026, inspection overdue by 389d; 500-P-507 (Dosing Pump - Chemical): Minor defect per IR-500-P-507-2024-030, inspection overdue by 359d; 400-T-404 (LPG Bullet): Moderate defect per IR-400-T-404-2025-035, inspection overdue by 73d; 200-PSV-207 (Reactor Relief Valve): Major defect per IR-200-PSV-207-2025-036, inspection overdue by 292d
